title: Add navigation links for Dashboard and Social Media sections

requirements.text: Add navigation menu items for Dashboard and Social Media sections to the Header component navigation, displaying them alongside existing Customers, Calendar, and Jobs links in both desktop and mobile views

quotes: Add clear navigation links/buttons to access the Dashboard and Social Media sections

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard link appears in the navigation menu
Social Media link appears in the navigation menu
Both links are visible in desktop navigation
Both links are visible in mobile hamburger menu
Navigation maintains the existing earth-tone styling

requirements.text: Create a Dashboard page component that displays revenue insights including monthly total revenue, number of jobs completed, and average job value

quotes: Dashboard - Revenue insights showing monthly totals, jobs completed, and average job value

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page displays total revenue for the current month
Dashboard shows count of jobs completed
Dashboard calculates and displays average job value
Dashboard is accessible via the Dashboard navigation link

requirements.text: Create a Social Media page component with tabs or sections for AI post generator, content calendar, template library, and post preview/editing functionality

quotes: Social Media - AI-powered post generator with mold remediation templates, content calendar, and template library

acceptanceCriteria: Social Media page is accessible via the Social Media navigation link
Page includes section for AI-powered post generation with topic, tone, and platform selection
Page includes content calendar view for planning posts
Page includes template library with categories: before/after, prevention tips, testimonials, emergency response, seasonal content
Page includes post preview and editing interface with copy to clipboard functionality

requirements.text: Configure routing to support Dashboard and Social Media pages with appropriate route paths and navigation integration
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard route is registered and accessible
Social Media route is registered and accessible
Routes are protected by authentication like existing routes
Navigation links correctly route to new pages

constraints: Do not modify the existing Header component's immutable paths (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui)
Maintain the existing earth-tone color scheme using warm greens and browns
Keep mobile-responsive design patterns consistent with existing pages
Use existing authentication and authorization patterns
nonGoals: Backend changes for Dashboard or Social Media features
Modifying existing Customers, Calendar, or Jobs pages
Implementing actual AI integration or external API calls
Adding drag-and-drop to the content calendar
